title: AED MC Client Mods
description:
The AskEuropeDiscord Minecraft Server pack.

The collection aims for a building and exploring feel, that let's you have a proper survival game with many building options and a few mods to enhance our community's interactions.
body:
### Ask.Europe.Discord – AED 
is the [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/BTX7cK3R4k) of a Reddit community named [Ask Europe](https://www.reddit.com/r/AskEurope/?rdt=42319). With members from all over the world, a nice shared gaming experience was always our main focus.

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NC7fW6z0/aeaef44f852e33ac0e029454695722f07792895f_96.webp)

We wanted a world that feels big, natural with a lot of neat gadgets but nothing that totally breaks the game. Create being the only main adjustment to the game, which is nerfed to a degree that makes it non-industrious

Click here for installation guide (later)


### Server-Info

The pack is made for our own server but can ofc be included in other larger setups. We use the following

- VM Server hosted in Germany **(only relevant if you actually want to join our server)**
- runs fabric 0.18.4
- runs Minecraft 1.21.11
- client side works with mininmum RAM (512MB) but more is advised

# I. Mods
### I.a Setup and Feel:
Mods we choose as a basic setup for how the server should be played and feel
- [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) is our core for the shared map and minimap
~~  - [Bluemap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bluemap) as a way to share our world with the rest of the community~~
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) in a limited setup. It has several options to make the development and building much more interesting (especially for the tech-fans) but we don't use it to its fullest as it can break the game, needs a bit of learning
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) to enrich the overall survival experience (we're still testing some of them Addons
- [Village Spawn point](https://modrinth.com/mod/village-spawn-point) you spawn in a village
- [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) quite elaborate inventory mod for chest-systems, needs a bit of learning
  


  ### I.b **WorldGen**  
  - [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) on the server side which makes it even nicer to have a big.big.World-feel mod
    - used together with [William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo) for the natural looking bioms
    - and [Taller Forests](https://modrinth.com/mod/taller-forests) for the same reason
  - [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify) it's a big world, it needs content to explore
  - [Structuory](https://modrinth.com/datapack/structory) it's a big big world....
  - [Useful Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-structures/version/v2.0+mod) it's a big big....

### I.c Noteworthy content
mods with additional items and blocks to built with
- several of [MaCaw's](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw) mods are included into the pack for a bigger selection of stuff to built
- several of [Seril's](https://modrinth.com/user/Serilum) mods, cause they each do their neat lil thing, reliably and they are light on performance AND they mostly work server-side only, go check him out
- [~~Handcrafted~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted) ~~cause you should feel at home at home~~  - **too hungry**
- [~~FramedBlocks~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/framedblocks) ~~cause the more the merrier~~  - **too hungry**
- [AnotherFurniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)
- [Lost Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/lost-relics) 

### I.d Enhance the gaming mods
mods that mainly aim to enhance the gaming-experience and make life easier
- [Elytra Accessory]([https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-accessory/version/1.3.1)) cause yeah 
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) Cause yeah the vanilla DebugMenu sucks (optional)
- [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest) cause yeah no one got time for that (server side)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) cause yeah, especially with many mods containing new blocks and receipts this will be necessary (optional)
- [Better Pets](https://modrinth.com/datapack/betterpets) + wandering pets
- [Backpacks!](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-backpacks) decent backpack mod that works well with fabric
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)


# II. Installing as a client

### II.A If you use modrinth 
,just install [this pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/aed-mc-client-mods/version/2.0.3) or the [slim version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/aed-mc-client-mods/version/3q6ykdEk) via the modrinth game launcher:

- inside the [modrinth software](https://modrinth.com/app) 
- click "+" (create new instance) .... 
- click "Install from modpack" 
- type "AED" when he asks you to search for a modpack. 
- Select our AED client mod. The rest should be done by the software. 

- Start the game start a multiplayer game and 
- join our server. (You will receive the IP-Adress on the [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/BTX7cK3R4k)

### II.B If you don't use Modrinth
,we will here pretend you use the default game launcher:

- install java
- install the minecraft launcher
- install [fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
- choose the correct version of the game 1.21.11
  ![fabric1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/353544791bf4dea4e8c3924474edb7bb0205b9a9.png)
- start the launcher
- go to installations
- look for the fabric install and click the folder symbol
  ![launcherfile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6b89f7eb2ca45bfda3a5f2919e2c5664e290c9e.png)
- go to the mods folder of your install
  ![launcherMods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e68d1a7efd325ed224758b2d9b7c779a34a7ba.png)
- at this point in time this folder might be empty or might not
- fill it with our mod files you will get [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1j-vmUMWQEZAE9UM7FKUQsa4egKXzNjn5/view?usp=sharing) as an archive or [here](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1knF8GFXizLswPBYyhQgvjdwKGwNIniU1?usp=sharing) as an unpacked folder. 
  - this means the .jar files must be inside the mod folder like so:
  ![launcerModList](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0203b21b7286e513004a7d900be11869367b808d.png)
- then the game should be able to start and you can join our server via multiplayer. You'll get the IP at our [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/BTX7cK3R4k)
